summary: TREND Archetype TP Suppression Fix - All 17 tests passed. Verified: (1) TREND trades do NOT send TP Limit orders in both code paths, (2) RANGE and FADE trades still send TP Limit with full quantity, (3) Scale-Out quantity is exactly 50% of total, (4) Scale-Out has move_stop_automated: False, (5) position_manager.py still calculates theoretical take_profit for TREND (suppression at webhook level only).
passed_tests: ✅ REGIME_TO_ARCHETYPE mapping correct: COMPLACENCIA/BULL/BEAR→TREND, TRANSICAO→RANGE, CAPITULACAO→FADE
✅ get_archetype() returns correct archetype for all regimes
✅ TREND calculate_position_params returns theoretical take_profit (suppression at webhook level)
✅ TREND scale_out config: enabled=True, pct=50, trigger_multiple=2.0, move_stop_to_entry=True
✅ RANGE has fixed take_profit at POC, no scale_out
✅ FADE has fixed take_profit at VWAP -1σ, no scale_out
✅ V3 signal endpoint returns regime in nivel_1 (TRANSICAO currently)
✅ Path 1 (execute_v3_signal) has 'arch != Arch.TREND' condition for TP suppression
✅ Path 2 (open_position_with_signalstack) has 'arch_val != TREND' condition for TP suppression
✅ Scale-out quantity calculation: Path 1 uses 'so_qty = max(1, quantity // 2)', Path 2 uses scale_out_cfg['pct']
✅ All TREND regimes (COMPLACENCIA, BULL, BEAR) suppress TP
✅ Scale-out only configured for TREND archetype
critical_code_review_comments: Path 1 (execute_v3_signal ~line 5662): Correctly checks 'arch != Arch.TREND' before sending TP Limit
Path 2 (open_position_with_signalstack ~line 5926): Correctly checks 'arch_val != TREND' before sending TP Limit
Both paths log 'TREND: TP Limit suprimido (trailing stop cuida da saida)' when TP is suppressed
Scale-out correctly uses partial quantity (50%) not full quantity
Scale-out has 'move_stop_automated': False indicating Fill Monitor service needed for future automation
position_manager.py still calculates theoretical take_profit for TREND (used for logging/reference)

test_credentials.note: Auth not required for position_manager tests (direct imports)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use direct imports and API calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: TREND TP Suppression fix verified. Key code locations: (1) server.py line 5662 - 'arch != Arch.TREND' condition in execute_v3_signal, (2) server.py line 5926 - 'arch_val != TREND' condition in open_position_with_signalstack. Both paths suppress TP Limit for TREND archetype (COMPLACENCIA, BULL, BEAR regimes). RANGE (TRANSICAO) and FADE (CAPITULACAO) still send TP Limit. Scale-out is TREND-only with 50% quantity. position_manager.py still calculates theoretical take_profit for TREND (suppression happens at webhook send level only).

feature_verification.range_tp_sent: Working - TRANSICAO sends TP Limit with full quantity
feature_verification.fade_tp_sent: Working - CAPITULACAO sends TP Limit with full quantity
feature_verification.scale_out_move_stop_automated: Working - set to False (requires Fill Monitor)
feature_verification.position_manager_theoretical_tp: Working - still calculates take_profit for TREND (suppression at webhook level)

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhooks are MOCKED in Paper Mode. Tests verify logic flow, not actual webhook delivery.
